Delhi Compressor Station Force Majeure -- LIFTED


Notice Text:

As posted on January 25, 2026, Southeast Supply Header, LLC experienced an outage at its Delhi Compressor Station (Delhi). As a result of Delhi being returned to service, effective immediately, all restrictions related with this Force Majeure have been lifted. Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
